{{Infobox construct
| name = The Fleshripper
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Fleshripper]] is an [[Underlord]] Countermeasure.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Fleshripper]] is a [[sword]]-[[construct]] that resembles a hunched armored skeleton.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] wants to see [[The Fleshripper]] in action.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
